name: a technology's rules flow acquire -> aggregate(origin project) -> enforce(scoped) -> promote(move to official)
command: ID=P559I01; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sg559i01 --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; agg=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project $ID --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].any?{|x|x["origin"]=="project"} ? "y":"n"'); printf '<template></template>\n' > App.vue; enf=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file App.vue --include-app-code --project $ID 2>&1 | grep -oE 'rules_checked=[0-9]+' | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-project-rule.sh" --project $ID --namespace vue --apply 2>/dev/null >/dev/null; prom=$([ -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/vue/sg559i01.yaml ] && echo y || echo n); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/vue; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$agg" = y ] && [ "$enf" -gt 0 ] && [ "$prom" = y ] && echo end-to-end-chain 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
